_comment: Declarative escalation policy for the intent layer (project 08). Data, not code — editing this file is not a deploy. It enumerates the conditions under which Jarvis escalates to the blocked-on-Michael state instead of proceeding unattended. The specific rules are deliberately conservative and meant to be tuned over time. See docs/projects/08-intent-layer/spec.md (the 'Escalation policy' section) and src/intent/escalation.ts.
